generated_by: Claude Code (Claude Opus 4.6) — manual run, reference_library applied

moments.reason: Zoom على لحظة قول التاريخ '6-6-2026' — أعلى info-density موعد في الفيديو. dolly_in gentle مع emphasis قوي. Reference pattern: audio-synced visual events at high-energy moments (emphasis at t=10.016, energy=0.1791).

scenes_skipped_reason: Reel is 19s — below 15s scene-spacing minimum threshold for full-screen scenes. Content is concrete announcement (greeting + date + venue + CTA), not abstract concepts. Reference_library `Numbered chapter overlay system` doesn't apply here either (no curriculum chapters). Visual storytelling delivered via overlays + smart_zoom + micro_events instead.

face_zone_computed.selection_reason: Above zone has 459px room vs 292px below. All overlays will use y_px in [300, 500] range to stay safely above face_top_px=759. Computed from face_map.json: face_center_y range [0.466, 0.517], face_height avg 0.140.

overlays.reason: BOOKEND OPENER (steal من reference_library). y_px=320 above face zone — face top=759, room above=459px. Workshop title massive bold + 'لأول مرة' yellow subtitle = the intro reveal اللي هيرجع يظهر في الـ outro بنفس الحجم. Pattern: 'Bookend title pattern' from feedback/reference_library.md.

MASSIVE YELLOW DATE — مطابق للـ reference reel '17 يناير' treatment. y_px=380 above face zone (CORRECTED from y=900 which collided with face). Face top=759 — overlay text (~200px tall) fits safely in [380, 580] above face. Pattern: 'Number highlights' + face-aware positioning per feedback/style_evolution.md.

VENUE STACK — two-tier title pattern من reference_library. y_px=400 above face zone (CORRECTED from y=900). Stack height ~150px → bottom at y=550, comfortably above face_top=759. Audio-synced: emphasis at t=14.816 (energy=0.217 — أعلى energy في الـ reel).
BOOKEND CLOSER — same composition as overlay_1 (visual rhyme at t=2.92 ↔ t=15.9). y_px=320 matches overlay_1 exactly. Pattern: 'Bookend title pattern' (steal) from feedback/reference_library.md.

micro_events.reason: أول mention للمدينة — pop يـ punctuate الـ direct address للجمهور المحلي

أعلى audio energy في الـ reel (t=4.192, energy=0.1962) — اللحظة دي هي الـ scarcity hook ('first time in Alex'). Strong pop يلحق الـ vocal emphasis بتاعة المتحدث. هذا تطبيق للـ 'Audio-synced visual events' pattern من reference_library.

ثاني أعلى energy في الـ reel (t=14.816, energy=0.217) — حي محدد للـ neighborhood targeting. Strong pop.

lower_third.build_up_note: STARTS AT t=4.66 (NOT t=0.5) — applying 'Build-up brand stack pattern' (steal) من reference_library. الـ hook frame (t=0-4.66) intentionally minimal — only speaker + caption + RSPAAC footer. lower_third + logo_bug join after first title reveal. Pattern source: reference reel showed minimal hook → gradual brand layer build-up over first 5-8 seconds creates higher hook attention.

logo_bug_override.build_up_note: Same as lower_third — logo bug reveal at t=4.66 to match build-up pattern. لو tokens.ts default = 0, override per this plan.

outro.skip_reason: الـ reel نفسه ينتهي بـ outro CTA built-in (overlay_4_outro_bookend). مفيش حاجة للـ standalone outro card اللي بيتضاف من Remotion side. الـ bookend بيلعب دور الـ outro.

validation_notes.overlay_spacing_min_sec_note: Default 20s spacing rule waived — short 19s reel needs denser visual events. Reference_library 'Audio-synced visual events at ~3-4s rhythm' justifies overlay density.
validation_notes.cadence_sec_note: Denser than 4s target — appropriate for 19s reel where every second carries information. Matches reference reel's ~3s cadence.
